h867375c9g4c24g4a9bgaf35gfcb5fedc38ca: Honesty might not be the best policy here. People spook easily.
hd2ffdeccg3f73g4e49gbf70g25502480b6da: We won't find help by keeping our mouths shut.
hdd9bb209g76b5g4050g83ebgb1272b311ad5: We won't find help if we're dead and buried, either.
h7e67fcfagad0dg416egba5bg9f5e95376cf4: Let's keep our condition on a need-to-know basis. As in, nobody needs to know.
h30586112ge90cg4bfcg929eg23f8540b45f6: Nobody but Halsin, at least - so let's get to finding him.
h4d1e99cfg667fg4140gac97gfeec2c6c881f: Lesson learned. We should have been more cautious.
hef9a2c3agca25g47f0ga343g8607e6cfcdad: We would have at least saved some trouble - and I dare say, Nettie's life.
